content:
📜 Handicap Rule:
✔ Students may read their passage instead of memorizing it, but they only receive 50% XP for the challenge.

📜 Refusal Penalty:
✔ If a student refuses to perform, they must write a 400-word analysis on the importance of performance in literature but receive a -10 XP penalty.

📜 Failure Consequence:
✔ If a student performs but forgets their lines or hesitates too much, they receive a temporary debuff on their next oral challenge (e.g., -5 XP on a future debate).

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages participation while allowing opt-outs.
• Prevents avoidance strategies from being cost-free.
• Adds a structured way to integrate risk and reward.

📜 2. The Secret Alignment System – How It Works & Why It Matters
